title: Sampling Techniques in Machine Learning
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision process and common techniques for selecting a sampling method based on data characteristics and project goals.
relationships: Start with the full Population Dataset, then decide between Probability or Non-Probability Sampling based on the need for representativeness and feasibility. Probability Sampling branches into its four main types, while Non-Probability Sampling branches into its two common types. All paths lead to the creation of a Final Sample for model training or evaluation.
